title: Cyclic
description: cyclic adds many useful items, blocks, cables, enchantments, potions
body:
This mod adds a large variety of unrelated items, tools, machines, enchantments, and a few potions.


As seen on Curseforge [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic)

As of Minecraft 1.19.4/1.20.1+ this is empowered by [this library mod](https://github.com/Lothrazar/flib)

<details>
<summary>Attributions:</summary>


Doorbell sound credits:

 http://soundbible.com/1599-Store-Door-Chime.html
 License: Attribution 3.0
 Recorded by Mike Koenig

    All other contributors and translators can also be seen [here on github](https://github.com/Lothrazar/Cyclic/graphs/contributors) and many [merged pull requests](https://github.com/Lothrazar/Cyclic/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged)</details>
